result:
Artifact written and validated. Here is the summary:

**15 row annotations** (10 Review Needed, 5 Needs More Context) across **4 pattern clusters** and **1 unmapped observation**.

**Patterns identified:**

| Pattern | Issue | Controls | Rows |
|---|---|---|---|
| PAT-ALP-MIXED | Alphabet uses Exempt, GST, and HST ON on Agency Fees. Same project ALP202307 coded GST in Dec but HST ON in Oct. | CHK-007, CHK-005 | 13,14,19-21,26,43-48 |
| PAT-AMZ-MIXED | Amazon uses GST (Dec) and HST ON (Apr/May) on Agency Fees. | CHK-007 | 17,18,27,31 |
| PAT-MEALS-SPLIT | T. Spaccio and Hungerhub each split Exempt/M&E on the same meals account. | CHK-018, CHK-015 | 7,10,51-53 |
| PAT-BILLEXP-SPLIT | Billable Expense: person-named vendors Exempt, company vendors HST ON. | CHK-016, CHK-015 | 11,12,24,29 |

**Standalone row flags:**
- Row 36: Virtual Assistants bill on Salaries account (CHK-013)
- Row 38: "Travel Stipend" reimbursement language (CHK-020)
- Rows 8, 9: Exempt purchases needing support (CHK-015)
